headline: Amcor Finishes 3D Printing Rollout As Valuation Gap Attracts Attention
summary: Amcor has completed the rollout of 3D printing facilities across all five of its global rigid packaging centres. The final phase was the implementation of the system at its Barcelona innovation centre, which is now live. This milestone is intended to support faster packaging development for key end markets and closer collaboration across regions. For investors watching NYSE:AMCR, this update comes with the shares at $48.43 and a return of 9.4% over the past 30 days. The stock is also up...

headline: Amcor adds 3D printing to Barcelona innovation centre
summary: The addition completes the roll-out of 3D printing facilities across all five of Amcor’s global rigid packaging centres.
